title: task
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:676-680 - The responder computes MAC_2 with only CRED_R in context_2, but per RFC 9528 Section 4.3.2 it should include both ID_CRED_R and CRED_R. The initiator correctly includes both (lines 385-392). This mismatch causes MAC verification to fail, breaking the EDHOC handshake entirely.
close_reason: Fixed: Added ID_CRED_R to context_2 in responder MAC_2 computation (lines 680-689), matching RFC 9528 Section 4.3.2 and initiator implementation. test_full_handshake validates end-to-end.
